feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP RAP Unmanaged Lock how to dequeue ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a RAP Unmanaged scenario were the UI does not have any EDIT button and the UI will be defaulted to edit mode and in this scenario we need to implement the lock mechanism. The Enqueue is working fine which is implemented using the factory method but when the browser is closed or disconnected how to handle the Dequeue as it remains locked.

Thanks & Regards,

Vinodkumar.

entry.title: MAKE EXCEL, PDF file with OLE!!
entry.content:
Hello, I've just been learning abap for 3 months.

I recently created a simple program by creating a virtual order history management table.
In the process, I made a code to convert the selected row into an Excel file and make it into a pdf file. However, there was a strange phenomenon that the code that worked at home(Window10) did not work properly in the school lab(Window11), and it worked in the computer(Window11) next to me, and it did not work with my MacBook(MacOS). Please I would appreciate it if you could look at the code once and find out the problem.

 

 

"PDF 출력.
FORM EXPORT_PDF USING P_INDEX.

  INCLUDE OLE2INCL. " OLE 관련 선언 포함.

  " 데이터 형식 선언.
  TYPES: T_C(1500) TYPE C,                     " 1500 길이의 문자열 타입.
         T_DATA TYPE TABLE OF T_C.             " T_C로 구성된 내부 테이블.

  " 데이터 선언.
  DATA: LV_TEMP TYPE STRING,                   " 선택된 파일 경로.
        LV_SOURCE TYPE RLGRAP-FILENAME,        " 원본 파일 경로.
        LV_DEST TYPE RLGRAP-FILENAME,          " 저장될 PDF 파일 경로.
        LV_APPLICATION TYPE OLE2_OBJECT,       " Excel 애플리케이션 객체.
        LV_WORKBOOK TYPE OLE2_OBJECT,          " Workbook 객체.
        LT_EXCEL TYPE T_DATA,                  " Excel 데이터를 저장할 내부 테이블.
        LS_EXCEL TYPE LINE OF T_DATA,          " 내부 테이블의 단일 행.
        LS_WWWDATATAB LIKE WWWDATATAB,
        DELI TYPE C.                           " 데이터 구분자.

  " 파일 경로 설정.
  CALL METHOD CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES=>DIRECTORY_BROWSE
    EXPORTING
      WINDOW_TITLE         =  '저장할 위치 선택'
    CHANGING
      SELECTED_FOLDER = LV_TEMP
    EXCEPTIONS
      CNTL_ERROR               = 1
      ERROR_NO_GUI             = 2
      NOT_SUPPORTED_BY_GUI     = 3
      OTHERS                   = 4.

  CONCATENATE LV_TEMP '\과제3.xlsx' INTO LV_SOURCE.
  CONCATENATE LV_TEMP '\과제3.pdf' INTO LV_DEST.

*  LV_SOURCE = 'C:\Users\User\Desktop\과제3.xls'.
*  LV_DEST = 'C:\Users\User\Desktop\과제3.pdf'.

  " ALV에서 선택된 데이터를 읽어오기.
  READ TABLE GT_ORDNO_ALV INTO GS_ORDNO_ALV INDEX P_INDEX.

  SELECT SINGLE *
    FROM WWWDATA
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF LS_WWWDATATAB
   WHERE OBJID = 'Z_EXCEL_TEMPLATE01'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'DOWNLOAD_WEB_OBJECT'
    EXPORTING
      KEY               = LS_WWWDATATAB
      DESTINATION        =  LV_SOURCE.

  " Excel 애플리케이션 객체 생성.
  CREATE OBJECT LV_APPLICATION 'EXCEL.APPLICATION'.

  " Excel 워크북 열기.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_APPLICATION 'WORKBOOKS' = LV_WORKBOOK.

  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'OPEN'
    EXPORTING #1 = LV_SOURCE.

  " 활성 워크시트 가져오기.
  GET PROPERTY OF LV_APPLICATION 'ACTIVESHEET' = LV_WORKBOOK.

  " 워크시트 이름 설정.
  SET PROPERTY OF LV_WORKBOOK 'Name' = '주문내역'.

  " 데이터 구분자 (탭 문자) 설정.
  DELI = CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>HORIZONTAL_TAB.

  " Excel 데이터의 첫 행: 헤더 정의.
  LS_EXCEL = |주문번호{ DELI }회원ID{ DELI }제품번호{ DELI }제품명{ DELI }매출금액{ DELI }판매일자|.
  APPEND LS_EXCEL TO LT_EXCEL.
  CLEAR: LS_EXCEL.

  " ALV 데이터 행을 Excel에 추가.
  LS_EXCEL = |{ GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZORDNO } { DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZIDCODE } {
  DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZMATNR } { DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZMATNAME } {
  DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZSLAMT } { DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZJDATE } |.
  APPEND LS_EXCEL TO LT_EXCEL.
  CLEAR LS_EXCEL.

  " 클립보드로 데이터 내보내기.
  DATA: LV_RC TYPE I.
  CALL METHOD CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES=>CLIPBOARD_EXPORT
    EXPORTING
      NO_AUTH_CHECK = ''
    IMPORTING
      DATA = LT_EXCEL
    CHANGING
      RC = LV_RC
    EXCEPTIONS
      CNTL_ERROR           = 1                " 컨트롤 에러.
      ERROR_NO_GUI         = 2                " GUI가 없음.
      NOT_SUPPORTED_BY_GUI = 3                " GUI가 해당 기능을 지원하지 않음.
      NO_AUTHORITY         = 4                " 권한 부족.
      OTHERS               = 5.


  " 클립보드의 데이터를 워크시트에 붙여넣기.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'PASTE'.

  CALL METHOD OF LV_APPLICATION 'ActiveWorkbook' = LV_WORKBOOK.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'Save'.

*  " Excel 파일로 저장.
*  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'SaveAs'
*    EXPORTING
*      #1 = LV_SOURCE
*      #2 = 1.                 " 파일 형식 코드: Excel 파일.


  " PDF 형식으로 내보내기.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'ExportAsfixedFormat'
    EXPORTING #1 = 0                  " 파일 형식: PDF.
              #2 = LV_DEST            " 저장 경로.
              #3 = 0.

  " 워크북 및 Excel 애플리케이션 종료.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'Close'.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_APPLICATION 'Quit'.

ENDFORM.

I'm Korean so I'm sorry that the annotation is in Korean,

entry.title: ME52N closed document going in editable mode BAPI_REQUISITION_DELETE
entry.content:
Hi gurus, The query is why the user is able to make changes once the PR is in closed status ?
User is expecting to get the delete indicator and closed indicator to be checked for the PR
created 45 days.

There is custom program and BAPI_REQUISITION_DELETE is used to delete and close the items.
The following is the code ::

 data lv_date1 type datum.
  data lv_date2 type datum.

  call function 'RP_CALC_DATE_IN_INTERVAL'
    exporting
      date      = sy-datum
      days      = '46'
      months    = '00'
      signum    = '-'
      years     = '00'
    importing
      calc_date = lv_date1.

  call function 'RP_CALC_DATE_IN_INTERVAL'
    exporting
      date      = sy-datum
      days      = '00'
      months    = '06'
      signum    = '-'
      years     = '00'
    importing
      calc_date = lv_date2.


  if lv_date1 is not initial.
    select banfn, bnfpo from eban
      into table @DATA(lt_eban)
      where badat le @LV_date1
      and   frgkz IN ('C', 'D')
      and loekz NE 'X'.
  endif.

*  if lv_date2 is not initial.
*    select banfn, bnfpo from eban
*      appending table @LT_eban
*      where badat le @LV_date2
*      and   frgkz = 'A'
*      and   statu = 'N'.
*  endif.


  if lt_eban is not initial.

    data lt_items type table of bapieband.
    data ls_items type bapieband.
    data(lt_head) = lt_eban[].
    data lt_ret type table of bapireturn.
    data ls_log type zmm_pr_del_log.

    sort lt_head by banfn.
    delete adjacent duplicates from lt_head comparing all fields.

    loop at lt_head into data(ls_head).
      refresh lt_items[].
      refresh lt_ret[].

      loop at lt_eban into data(ls_eban) where banfn = ls_head-banfn.
        ls_items-preq_item = ls_eban-bnfpo.
        ls_items-delete_ind = 'X'.
        ls_items-closed     = 'X'.    "PASHA 17/10/2024
        append ls_items to lt_items.
        clear ls_items.
      endloop.

      call function 'BAPI_REQUISITION_DELETE'
        exporting
          number                      = ls_head-banfn
        tables
          requisition_items_to_delete = lt_items
          return                      = lt_ret.

      read table lt_ret into data(ls_ret) with key type = 'E'.
      if sy-subrc = 0.
        ls_log-banfn = ls_head-banfn.
        loop at lt_items into ls_items.
          ls_log-bnfpo = ls_items-preq_item.
          ls_log-message = ls_ret-message.
          ls_log-zdate = sy-datum.
          ls_log-uzeit = sy-uzeit.
          ls_log-uname = sy-uname.
          ls_log-status = 'E'.
          modify zmm_pr_del_log from ls_log.
        endloop.
        clear ls_log.
      else.
        ls_log-banfn = ls_head-banfn.
        loop at lt_items into ls_items.
          ls_log-bnfpo = ls_items-preq_item.
          ls_log-message = ls_ret-message.
          ls_log-zdate = sy-datum.
          ls_log-uzeit = sy-uzeit.
          ls_log-uname = sy-uname.
          ls_log-status = 'S'.
          modify zmm_pr_del_log from ls_log.
        endloop.
        clear ls_log.
      endif.


    endloop.

  endif.

I have observed two scenarios at me52n once this code gets executed.

for EBAN-ESTKG (PRODUCTION ORDER(F)) it is giving me the expected result which is not editable after
running the above code.

However ,

For all other scenarios other than production order it is going in editable mode after running through the same above code like below

Strange thing is that in the first scenario closed is not ticked but it was non editable , in the second one closed is ticked but i can able to undelete and make changes.


My question is why it is working fine in PRODUCTION ORDER case but not in other cases though
the code is same.

The requirement is once the code is executed it should be non editable for all documents based on the select query in the code.

Is it that needs to be fixed from functional end or is it SAP's glitch as it is making
item number editable after the PR is closed.

Thank in advance for your replies

entry.title: How to fill item navigation property of standard API to create Supplier Invoice in S4 HANA CLoud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working in S4 HANA public cloud and my requirement is to create Supplier Invoice by passing header data and navigation property "to_SelectedServiceEntrySheets" of API "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SUPPLIERINVOICE_PROCESS_SRV/A_SupplierInvoice".

I have created service consumption model for this API in eclipse. But, in the CREATE operation of consumption model no code generated to navigate to "to_SelectedServiceEntrySheets" as I need to supply two fields here "ServiceEntrysheet" and ServiceEntryItem" as this is mandatory to POST supplier invoice.

I have successfully supplied the header data and when I execute the code, I am getting message "No Item data supplied to post invoice". This is because above navigation property is not supplied in the payload.

Kindly suggest how I can supply the data into "to_SelectedServiceEntrySheets" of this API.

I have attached my code for reference.

Many Thanks In advance!

entry.title: Fetch data in ABAP, using SDA connection
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have data in table created on SDA connection, and want to fetch in ABAP.

Do we have any direct way to read data from SDA in ABAP?

One possible option for us is to, create virtual table in a database schema and fetch data in AMDP, and CDS table functions.

Thanks.

entry.title: Create WBS element using BAPi with Project HIERARCHY
entry.content: HI Team, i am creating Project definition and WBS element with hierarchy using 'BAPI_BUS2054_CREATE_MULTI.  could you please some one help me with sample code how to pass hierarchy ? if its not possible create WBS element with project hierarchy please suggest BAPi to create Project definiation and WBS elements single shot.

entry.title: Pros and Cons of having one SAP BTP ABAP subaccount connected to multiple backend systems
entry.content: Is it recommended to have one BTP ABAP subaccount for one backend S4 system? Or can we have multiple S4 backend systems connected to one BTP ABAP subaccount together? What are the pros and cons of each approach.

entry.title: Urgent help - SAP Standard BAPI/FM to update LIPS-MBDAT - Staging date of a delivery item
entry.content:
Hi Experts, ABAP Development 

Is any FM/BAPI is there to update staging date(LIPS-MBDAT) of a delivery at item level?

I have seen many links with similar question but there is no answer posted.

 I tried with WB2_PROCESS_DL_ITEM_CHANGE and WB2_ADD_ON_CHANGE_DL but nothing is worked.

I dont want to go with BDC or direct table updates. Please let me know if there is any other way to update this field.

entry.title: Service broker error: when trying to create an ABAP instance in BTP trial account
SAP Support remote access to a BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi

I have logged a case with SAP Support for a solution involving a SAP BTP ABAP environment. The SAP Support Consultant has requested access to the BTP ABAP environment.

I have searched the help, forums and SAP notes however I could find no documentation on how to create the necessary SAP Support Technical user. I can see a _SAPSUPPORT technical user but I see no way to set a password for the user

I saw somewhere that the system does not need a SAProuter set up as SAP can access the URL directly.

The consultant is not in the same time zone as myself and I don't want to lose another day on this so if anyone can provide some input / guidance on this I would appreciate it.

Thank you

Gavin

entry.title: How to get User details in BTP RAP
entry.content: How to Read User details in BTP RAP. I need to read email id of the user.

entry.title: Issue Accessing SAP BTP Cockpit and Configuring ABAP Cloud Project in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently facing an issue while trying to access the SAP BTP Cockpit and configure my environment in Eclipse for the course "Learning the Basics of ABAP on SAP BTP". Here are the details:

When I log in to SAP BTP Cockpit, it shows:
"Logged in as x@email.com. We couldn't find any global accounts associated with your user. If you believe this is a mistake, contact your cloud operator."

A few days ago, everything was working fine. I could access the Cockpit and use it for the course setup.

I've noticed that:

The link https://account.hana.ondemand.com/cockpit/#/home/allaccounts works for me.
However, sometimes it redirects me to https://cockpit.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/, which doesn’t work and shows the error mentioned above.


I managed to access the Cockpit through the working link and copied the JSON key from the instance to create a new ABAP Cloud project in Eclipse. However, when trying to connect in Eclipse, I get the error:
"Failed to get service instance URL info for https://23bf02f0-9d4d-4fe7-ae57-cab54ffafb1e.abap.us10.hana.ondemand.com: Unexpected response code: 503"

Could anyone guide me on:

Why the SAP BTP Cockpit redirects to a non-functional link and how to fix it?
How to resolve the issue in Eclipse to proceed with my ABAP setup in order to continue with the SAP course?
Any help would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

Juan

entry.title: Can we discuss SAP ABAP Platform 2022 SP01, Developer Edition on Cloud Appliance Library (CAL)
entry.content:
Hi 

I'm generally interested in ABAP testdrives. I don't use them for much, but for more than 20 years I have seen it as a challenge to make the newest version run.
I have currently ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01 running on Docker and this time I am actually using the testdrive to evaluate if it is also time for me to switch from SE38 to Eclipse 🤔

I can see that this version (Developer Trial 2022 SP01) also exist in a CAL / cloud version, but i'm not sure it is actually the same product? When reading the getting started guide, I get the impression that it is actually the same product - just running in cloud instead of on-premise(docker), but when I read the recommended VM sizes I don't understand anything.

The recommended size for the cloud version is 32 cores and 256 GB memory, but I run the Docker version on a labtop with 10 cores in total and out of 32 GB ram, only 20 GB is assigned to Docker . 

The cost of a Cloud VM with 32 cores and 256 GB is astronomic (from a freelance ABAP'ers point of view) and I find it hard to believe that anyone use this option?

  1. Why is the the required memory for the cloud version more than 10 times higher than the Docker version?
  2. Did I completely misunderstand everything?

@julieplummer20 

Regards Thomas 

PS. I didn't really find a suitable "SAP Managed Tag" for this question, so I hope that it hits a suitable place in the Community.

entry.title: IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM NOT getting updated from EBAN
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am using bapi to update EBAN table as below......

 

 

 loop at lt_head into data(ls_head).
      refresh lt_items[].
      refresh lt_ret[].

      loop at lt_eban into data(ls_eban) where banfn = ls_head-banfn.
        ls_items-preq_item = ls_eban-bnfpo.
        ls_items-delete_ind = 'X'.
        ls_items-closed     = 'X'.    
        append ls_items to lt_items.
        clear ls_items.
      endloop.

    call function 'BAPI_REQUISITION_DELETE'
        exporting
          number                      = ls_head-banfn
        tables
          requisition_items_to_delete = lt_items
          return                      = lt_ret.

I have marked the loekz and sabkz as 'X' (releasing and deletion indicator)
which I have achieved. I can see and confirm at EBAN table level.

But when I use the ME52N for the document where loekz is 'X' , in the run time i can see the
ls_mereqitem-loekz is not 'X' though at the EBAN table level it is showing as X.

IF sy-tcode = 'ME52N'.
if ls_mereqitem-loekz = 'X' OR ls_mereqitem-ebakz = 'X'.
IF SY-UCOMM = 'MEREQFLUSH'.
message : 'The document can not be edited.' type 'E'.

endif.

It is happening for few records........
What could be the reason for it ..........

entry.title: Getting Tax item missing for tax code error from BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST.
entry.content: The issue is because we are sending zero tax, so no BSET internal table is filling and we are getting this standard error. Any idea on this.

entry.title: SAP Joule with SAP BTP Trail Version
entry.content:
Hello Everyone-

I  have taken SAP BTP Trail version for few days, Can i activate Joule using this. When I refer help.sap.com

Prerequisites | SAP Help Portal  it is not clear if BTP Trial version will be supported. Please advice.

 

Also Please provide the steps as how can i do this

entry.title: Expose external API to SAP DM
entry.content:
HI, 
I am trying to test a scenario where: Expose an S/4HANA private cloud API to SAP Digital Manufacturing, and use this API as external API in the production process designer. 
My progress is as below: 

  1. Create destination on SAP BTP

    Checked connection: Green without any error. 
    User is technical user created in the ERP system. 
  2. Create server via app "Manage Web Servers" in SAP DM

    After server SCN_S4DEMO created, I connected this server to DMC_Cloud server. So now server SCN_S4DEMO will be consumed by DMC_Cloud. 
  3. Create service via app "Manage Service Registry" in SAP DM
     
    Added service definition here with response as well. 
  4. Create production process with this service via app "Production process designer" in SAP DM

    But this production process kept giving the same error at step 2: 

    If i look into the error message in debug mode, it says Failed to resolve "Host" (this info is identical to the URL stated at step 1). 

Seems like SAP DM cannot speak to the backend system but it is connected when click on Check Connection in BTP. 
Note: everything is configured based on https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/business-process-extensions-developer-s-guide/api-services-restful-and-odata

Any help is appreciated! 

KR,
Sunny

entry.title: RAP BO, impossible to DELETE table Row
entry.content:
In a Behavior Definition of a BO, I need to integrate a DELETE query : 

DELETE FROM ztable WHERE id = @existing_row_in_ztable-id

Unfortunately, this doesn't work. At Runtime execution of this snippet, it gives the following error

ABAP Runtime error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT'

Now you way rightfully ask: "Are you really trying to delete a row directly from the table ?"
And to That I would respond: "I wanted to delete the row from the Consumption view but Eclipse wouldn't let me."

When trying to delete the row from the Consumption view, it gives the following error: 

Change operations on entities are not yet supported.

So I'm asking for your guidance: How am I supposed to delete a Row from the Table ?

entry.title: How to setup BTP Destination with Document Translation API at SAP Translation Hub
entry.content:
Hello.

First of all, I am new to the SAP BTP system, so I am not familiar with the understanding and use of the system.
I'm now trying to make a demo application that translates other language documents by Build Apps.

So I designed the flow as follows.
Connect Document Translation API to BTP Destinations,
Connect Destinations to Build Actions,
finaly I would like to make the Application by Build Apps.

However, when I tried to connect Document Translation API to BTP Destinations, I found that the OAuth2.0 Application Flow used by API was not in the Authentication option of BTP Destinations.

I'm currently applying Authentication to Destinations based on the elements used to set up the API's Environment, but I receive a response such as "401 Authentication Error" when conducting a connection test.
(I check that it's working when the terminal sends a command with a header and body through the curl command, but we used the bearer as Authorization at this time.)

I've tried many things, but the problem hasn't been solved, so I'd like to ask for your help.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: ABAP CDS getting count of multiple tables in one CDS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is it possible to get the count of entries from multiple tables (with no linkage) into a single CDS view.

Actually we are trying to use this CDS for reconciliation purposes and send this information to non SAP data lake to compare the count of records.

Thank You.

Vinod
